tasks.title: T1 — Add product config schemas and resolver. Extend ProjectConfigSchema with optional product metadata and RelatedRepoSchema with repo_project_id/product_role. Implement resolveProductContext(root) with single_repo/primary/secondary modes, default missing_primary_policy=block, read_only/isolated warnings, duplicate/unknown repo validation. TDD: red tests for no config, primary, secondary, missing primary policies, duplicate repo IDs, invalid primary refs.
tasks.summary: Added ProductLink schema and product-aware RelatedRepo fields. Added resolveProductContext with single_repo/primary/secondary modes, missing-primary block/read_only/isolated handling, duplicate repo validation, and primary ref validation. Added product-context tests covering schema parse and resolver modes/failures. Verification passed: product-context tests, target-project regression, typecheck.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added ProductLink schema and product-aware RelatedRepo fields. Added resolveProductContext with single_repo/primary/secondary modes, missing-primary block/read_only/isolated handling, duplicate repo validation, and primary ref validation. Added product-context tests covering schema parse and resolver modes/failures. Verification passed: product-context tests, target-project regression, typecheck.

tasks.title: T2 — Wire product context into plugin init/store runtime. Resolve ProductContext before createStore; route product-state store with productProjectId; ensure secondary init registers/service-checks primary product Temporal queue; expose both repoProjectId and productProjectId to tools. Add regression tests that worktree base still uses repoProjectId and product workflow IDs use productProjectId.
tasks.verification: Completed T2 with checkpoint commit ae150d93b89e02b7e8ff79cfc4a963f4f2c2dfaf.
tasks.summary: Wired product context through store runtime: Store exposes productContext; createStore accepts productContext and still routes Temporal workflows by projectIdOverride. Plugin init now resolves ProductContext and uses productProjectId for Temporal runtime/store external root while retaining repoProjectId in productContext for repo-local tools. Added store-product-context test. Verification passed: product-context/store-product-context tests and typecheck.
tasks.implementation_summary: Wired product context through store runtime: Store exposes productContext; createStore accepts productContext and still routes Temporal workflows by projectIdOverride. Plugin init now resolves ProductContext and uses productProjectId for Temporal runtime/store external root while retaining repoProjectId in productContext for repo-local tools. Added store-product-context test. Verification passed: product-context/store-product-context tests and typecheck.

tasks.title: T3 — Add structural scope_repos to ChangeSchema and change tools. Implement ChangeRepoScopeSchema, adv_change_create scope_repos input/defaulting, validation against ProductContext.repos, and adv_change_show/list output. Cover backend-only, web-only, and backend+web changes with tests.
tasks.verification: Completed T3 with checkpoint commit e569ee663ebd456aa5c302bda4da7e18395f68cb.
tasks.summary: Added ChangeRepoScope schema and scope_repos to ChangeSchema. adv_change_create now accepts scope_repos, defaults linked-product changes to current repo, validates unknown/duplicate repo IDs and duplicate merge_order, enriches entries from ProductContext, returns scope_repos in tool output, and saves scope metadata. Added product-linked create tests. Verification passed: cross-project coordination tests, product/store related tests, typecheck.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added ChangeRepoScope schema and scope_repos to ChangeSchema. adv_change_create now accepts scope_repos, defaults linked-product changes to current repo, validates unknown/duplicate repo IDs and duplicate merge_order, enriches entries from ProductContext, returns scope_repos in tool output, and saves scope metadata. Added product-linked create tests. Verification passed: cross-project coordination tests, product/store related tests, typecheck.

tasks.title: T4 — Update adv_status and change list filtering for product scope. From linked secondary, default to current repo scoped changes; add explicit product-wide mode. Include product context summary in status output. Test current repo default, product-wide view, single-repo unchanged behavior, and stale/hot recommendations under scoped filtering.
tasks.verification: Completed T4 with checkpoint commit cc6027f5e36b75df99567efbc5ccc6db5695082e.
tasks.summary: Added product-linked `scope: repo|product` visibility to adv_change_list and adv_status. Default repo scope filters scoped changes to current product repo while retaining unscoped legacy changes; product scope shows all product changes. Added product context output for both tools and status view projection. Tests cover repo-default filtering and product-wide visibility. Verification passed: cross-project/status suites, related regressions, typecheck.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added product-linked `scope: repo|product` visibility to adv_change_list and adv_status. Default repo scope filters scoped changes to current product repo while retaining unscoped legacy changes; product scope shows all product changes. Added product context output for both tools and status view projection. Tests cover repo-default filtering and product-wide visibility. Verification passed: cross-project/status suites, related regressions, typecheck.

tasks.title: T5 — Add product wisdom/reflection origin tags and query filtering. Persist origin_repo_id, origin_repo_project_id, origin_repo_path, and product_id on new entries. Default linked repo queries to current-repo-relevant plus promoted/global entries; add explicit product-wide query mode. Test legacy untagged entries remain visible safely.
tasks.summary: Added linked-product origin tags to wisdom and reflection records: product_id, origin_repo_id, origin_repo_project_id, origin_repo_path. adv_wisdom_add now tags change-level and promoted wisdom entries, routes workflow handles through productProjectId when present, and fallback disk storage accepts origin tags. adv_wisdom_list/adv_project_wisdom_list now support scope: repo|product; linked repo default filters change-level wisdom to current repo while retaining legacy untagged and promoted project entries, and product scope returns all product wisdom. Reflection entries now persist origin tags and listReflections supports product/repo filters. Added RED/GREEN tests for wisdom tagging/filtering and reflection tagging; format normalized touched prior product-link files.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added linked-product origin tags to wisdom and reflection records: product_id, origin_repo_id, origin_repo_project_id, origin_repo_path. adv_wisdom_add now tags change-level and promoted wisdom entries, routes workflow handles through productProjectId when present, and fallback disk storage accepts origin tags. adv_wisdom_list/adv_project_wisdom_list now support scope: repo|product; linked repo default filters change-level wisdom to current repo while retaining legacy untagged and promoted project entries, and product scope returns all product wisdom. Reflection entries now persist origin tags and listReflections supports product/repo filters. Added RED/GREEN tests for wisdom tagging/filtering and reflection tagging; format normalized touched prior product-link files.

tasks.title: T6 — Implement multi-repo archive/preflight metadata for scoped changes. Resolve scope_repos, collect per-repo before/after refs and verification evidence, run all ff-only merge preflights before any merge, honor merge_order, and fail safely with no merge on preflight failure. Add archive bundle tests for single repo unchanged and backend+web refs captured.
tasks.summary: Implemented multi-repo archive metadata for changes with scope_repos. Archive now sorts scoped repos by merge_order, captures branch/default branch/default head/head_before/head_after per repo, collects done-task verification evidence, writes multi-repo-archive.json to external and in-repo archive bundles, and returns multiRepo metadata from adv_change_archive. Added all-repo ff-only preflight before bundle writes; required repo preflight failure returns success:false with no archive bundle written. Added robust default branch ref fallback to main/master when configured default ref is unavailable. Single-repo archive bundles remain unchanged with no multi-repo metadata file. Added archive tests for unchanged single repo, backend+web ordered refs/evidence, and fail-safe diverged default branch.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented multi-repo archive metadata for changes with scope_repos. Archive now sorts scoped repos by merge_order, captures branch/default branch/default head/head_before/head_after per repo, collects done-task verification evidence, writes multi-repo-archive.json to external and in-repo archive bundles, and returns multiRepo metadata from adv_change_archive. Added all-repo ff-only preflight before bundle writes; required repo preflight failure returns success:false with no archive bundle written. Added robust default branch ref fallback to main/master when configured default ref is unavailable. Single-repo archive bundles remain unchanged with no multi-repo metadata file. Added archive tests for unchanged single repo, backend+web ordered refs/evidence, and fail-safe diverged default branch.

tasks.title: T7 — Update specs, command docs, and PokeEdge adoption guidance. Add advance-workflow requirements for product linking, scope_repos, product status filtering, product wisdom tags, and multi-repo archive evidence. Update adv-proposal/discover/prep/apply/archive docs. Add PokeEdge example config snippets and note additive migration/legacy state behavior.
tasks.summary: Updated advance-workflow spec and rendered docs with product-linked ADV state requirements: product/repo identity planes, structural scope_repos, product-scoped list/status behavior, wisdom/reflection origin tags, and multi-repo archive evidence/preflight requirements. Updated adv-proposal, adv-discover, adv-prep, adv-apply, and adv-archive command docs with product-linked scope handoffs and archive metadata expectations. Added docs/pokeedge-product-linking.md with primary backend + secondary web project.json examples, scope behavior, wisdom/reflection origin notes, multi-repo archive evidence, and additive legacy-state behavior. Added asset tests pinning spec/doc anchors.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated advance-workflow spec and rendered docs with product-linked ADV state requirements: product/repo identity planes, structural scope_repos, product-scoped list/status behavior, wisdom/reflection origin tags, and multi-repo archive evidence/preflight requirements. Updated adv-proposal, adv-discover, adv-prep, adv-apply, and adv-archive command docs with product-linked scope handoffs and archive metadata expectations. Added docs/pokeedge-product-linking.md with primary backend + secondary web project.json examples, scope behavior, wisdom/reflection origin notes, multi-repo archive evidence, and additive legacy-state behavior. Added asset tests pinning spec/doc anchors.

tasks.title: T8 — Run full verification and PokeEdge product-link simulation. Execute targeted tests added by T1-T7, then `pnpm run check`, full relevant test suite, and build from plugin/. Validate example PokeEdge primary/secondary configs in temp fixtures: secondary resolves product state, status filters repo scope, cross-cutting change visible from both repos, wisdom origin tags query correctly.
tasks.verification: Review remediation passed: product-context tests, status/wisdom/cross-project tests, archive tests, pnpm run check, pnpm test rerun, pnpm run build.

wisdom.content: adv_change_update writes every provided artifact field, including empty strings. During refinement, omit unchanged fields rather than passing empty strings, or previously approved proposal/agreement/design content can be clobbered and must be restored from tool output.

Product-linked wisdom/reflection tools must route Temporal change handles through store.productContext.productProjectId when present. Using repo-local getProjectId(store.paths.root) from a secondary repo can miss the canonical product-state workflow.

Archive multi-repo safety should collect and validate every scoped repo before writing bundles or merging. Sort scope_repos by merge_order, capture immutable before/after refs, and fail before side effects when any required repo fails ff-only ancestry preflight.

Integration tests that instantiate AdvancePlugin can exceed Vitest's 5s default under full-suite Temporal worker/bundle load even when they pass individually. Give plugin-init/worker-startup integration tests explicit timeout budgets instead of treating first full-suite timeout as behavior failure.

Product-linked config schemas can expose degradation modes before runtime honors them. Every enum branch like missing_primary_policy must have explicit resolver behavior and tests; otherwise schema-valid configs silently collapse to default blocking behavior.

proposal.approval_evidence: Existing proposal and problem statement loaded for GitHub issue #59. User explicitly requested investigation/discovery for this issue; treating as approval to proceed from proposal into discovery.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery agreement approved by command-as-approval: user invoked /adv-design immediately after discovery approval prompt. Agreement captures objectives O1-O7, AC1-AC9, constraints, and PokeEdge evidence.

design.approval_evidence: Design complete. Validator verdict CAUTION; caution findings resolved inline by documenting Temporal queue coupling and replacing duplicate product.repos registry with hybrid product metadata + related_repos registry. No unresolved conflict or contract-compromise risk.

planning.approval_evidence: Prep approved by command-as-approval: user invoked adv-prep after prep approval prompt. Task graph has 8 tasks with dependencies and inline TDD intent. Strict validation passed with only NO_DELTAS warning (expected until spec task).

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. All 8 tasks done with checkpoint commits. T8 full verification passed: targeted regression tests, pnpm run check, pnpm test, and pnpm run build. Worktree clean after checkpoint.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work with explicit reply `accept`. Review blockers and issues resolved. Verification passed: pnpm run check, pnpm test, pnpm run build; ADV validation passed with NO_DELTAS warning only.

release.approval_evidence: Release sign-off received from user: `sign off`. Pre-archive validation passed strict with NO_DELTAS warning only. Conformance status checked; no configured conformance specs. Worktree clean before archive. Final verification evidence: pnpm run check, pnpm test, pnpm run build passed.

clarify_findings.message: Success criteria are placeholder or empty. What measurable outcomes define done?
Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?
Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
